tagline: A child supported with trust blossoms in every season.

location.full: Cumhuriyet Neighborhood, 1979 St. No:16 Floor:2 Door:44 Esenyurt / Istanbul

hero.title: Every child and parent has a different story. At PEDA, each person is welcomed with their own story.
hero.description:
Here we don't only observe children; we prioritize truly knowing them and support every developmental journey with an individualized approach aligned with each person's potential. Likewise, we see the bond we build with parents as an inseparable part of this journey and embrace a development model where we move forward together.

At PEDA, every process is built on getting acquainted, examining details, and guiding with sensitivity—because growth flourishes only within cherished details and a bond formed with love.

home.introSubtitle: A supportive and inclusive workshop culture
home.introBody: At PEDA, all programs for children, adults, and families are planned by experts based on individual needs. Our goal is to provide a safe and welcoming space where each participant can grow with confidence.

audienceDesc.children: We strengthen children and young people’s potential through developmental play workshops, individual counseling, and student coaching.
audienceDesc.adults: We offer psychoeducation workshops and individual sessions that support personal growth and nurture awareness and communication skills.
audienceDesc.families: We aim to strengthen family bonds through parent guidance and growth-oriented practices.
audienceDesc.institutions: We offer structured development-focused solutions tailored to institutional needs.

whyItems: Holistic perspective focused on children, adults, and families
Warm, modern, and inclusive workshop environment
A systematic structure that tracks and supports development

parent.title: Parented & Independent Development Workshops
parent.short: Social, emotional, and cognitive growth is supported through workshops tailored to age and developmental needs.
parent.long: Offered with both parent-participation and independent options, these workshops help children learn in a safe environment, improve expression skills, and strengthen relational bonds.

languages.title: English & German Workshops
languages.short: Workshop programs support language learning through natural interaction, play, and participation.
languages.long: English and German workshops help participants discover a new language through an enjoyable, natural, and lasting experience.

assessment.title: Developmental Assessment & Tracking
assessment.short: Assessment and follow-up practices help us better understand each individual’s developmental process.
assessment.long: Developmental testing and tracking are structured to identify strengths, support areas, and developmental needs more clearly.

consulting.title: Parent Counseling
consulting.short: Counseling supports parents in strengthening the parent-child relationship and guiding development in a healthy way.
consulting.long: Parent counseling offers guidance on daily challenges, communication language, boundary-setting, emotional support, and developmental routines.

psychology.title: Clinical Psychologist Support
psychology.short: Need-based specialist support helps improve psychological well-being and personal awareness.
psychology.long: Clinical psychologist support offers a trust-based professional space for children, youth, and adults, structured according to individual needs.

coaching.title: Middle & High School Student Coaching
coaching.short: Structured coaching supports academic process, motivation, and goal management.
coaching.long: Coaching for middle and high school students supports planning, focus, responsibility, goal-setting, and process management.

about.heroTitle: At PEDA, development begins with trust
about.heroDesc: PEDA was designed to offer a warm and trustworthy development-focused workshop space for children, adults, families, and institutions.
about.intro:
At PEDA, development begins with connection and trust.

Before every program, we hold introductory meetings and developmental assessments so that building a trust- and connection-focused relationship with both your child and you is our first step. This also gives us the opportunity to support each child at their own pace and according to their potential in our workshops, structured around age-appropriate developmental milestones.

who.title: PEDA
who.desc: A child-adult workshop built on holistic developmental support.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: To support each individual’s growth journey with trust, understanding, and expertise while offering an inclusive and inspiring environment.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To be a trusted, contemporary, and inspiring center in child, adult, and family development work.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.desc: At PEDA, we adopt a warm and respectful communication style tailored to each individual. Structured content, expert support, and safe interaction areas strengthen the development process.

support.title: Who do we support?
support.desc: We aim to empower children, adolescents, adults, parents, and institutions through need-based programs and expert support.

workshops.heroTitle: Development spaces for every age and need
workshops.heroDesc: The services we offer at PEDA are designed to support children, adults, families, and students through multidimensional development processes.
